--- ### ALL PAGES ### layout: themes/classy/admin/core/minimal-viewport-locked ### THEME CONFIG ### theme: header: title: content: "Marketing Calendar" icon: "calendar-days" breadcrumbs: items: - label: "Admin" href: "/admin" - label: "Marketing" - label: "Calendar" actions: items: - label: "Create Campaign" icon: "plus" color: "primary" attributes: - ["id", "btn-create-campaign"] ### REGULAR PAGES ### meta: title: "Marketing Calendar - Admin" description: "Schedule and manage marketing campaigns — emails and push notifications" breadcrumb: "Calendar" ### ICON PRE-RENDERING ### prerender_icons: - name: "chevron-left" - name: "chevron-right" - name: "plus" - name: "pen" - name: "trash" - name: "clock" - name: "envelope" - name: "bell" - name: "paper-plane" - name: "calendar-day" - name: "calendar-week" - name: "calendar" - name: "grid-2" - name: "mobile" - name: "circle-check" - name: "triangle-exclamation" - name: "xmark" - name: "rotate-right" - name: "eye" - name: "link" - name: "tags" - name: "users" - name: "bullhorn" - name: "code" - name: "sliders" - name: "arrow-up-right-from-square" - name: "repeat" - name: "wifi" - name: "battery-full" - name: "table-list" ---
{% uj_icon "plus", "fa-md me-2" %} Create Campaign
{% uj_icon "bullhorn", "fa-sm me-2 text-info" %} Campaign Type
Campaign name is required (3-100 characters)
Subject is required
Please provide a valid icon URL
Please provide a valid URL
Loading preview...
Send only to admin/test recipients instead of the full audience. Use this to preview the campaign before going live.
{% uj_icon "clock", "fa-sm me-2 text-info" %} Schedule
Date is required
Time is required
{% uj_icon "repeat", "fa-sm me-2 text-info" %} Recurrence (optional)
This campaign will repeat automatically. Editing changes all future sends.
{% uj_icon "users", "fa-sm me-2 text-success" %} Targeting
Which services to send through. Leave unchecked to use all enabled providers.
{% uj_icon "sliders", "fa-sm me-2 text-info" %} Advanced Settings (optional)
{% uj_icon "eye", "fa-md me-2" %} Campaign Details
